assertions.assertion: Calls AddIdentityServerConfiguration with options.IdentityServerBaseUrl set to 'https://identity.example.com'
assertions.rationale: Does not call AddIdentityServerConfiguration() at all. Does not set IdentityServerBaseUrl. Builds a fully custom solution.

assertions.assertion: Sets up JWT bearer authentication pointing to the main IdentityServer as Authority

assertions.rationale: Does not call MapDynamicClientRegistration(). Uses a custom MapPost('/connect/register', ...) endpoint instead.

assertions.assertion: Does NOT call AddIdentityServer() — this is a separate host, not an IdentityServer instance
assertions.rationale: Does not call AddIdentityServer(). The separate service does not set up a full IdentityServer instance.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that the IClientConfigurationStore must be backed by the same database IdentityServer reads from
assertions.rationale: States 'The DCR service must share the same database as IdentityServer so that registered clients are visible to both'.
